commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=754f3854c8052f400552783142315c692d580d9c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens plugin, provider, Codex app-server, schema, cache-key, and config metadata boundaries against malformed, unreadable, circular, or non-JSON-compatible synthetic values.

Reproducibility: yes. for the current review findings: source inspection shows Date/Map-like schema objects can pass the new JSON-compatibility walker, and string/bigint descriptor context values produce identical cache fragments. The broader hardening behavior is supported by the PR's added synthetic regression tests rather than a local live repro in this review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow automated repair can address the two mechanical code defects, while final merge still needs maintainer acceptance of the compatibility and fail-closed behavior.
